answer: Employees are eligible for annual leave subject to manager approval. Leave requests should be submitted in advance through the HR system.
Employees may work remotely based on team policy and manager approval. Sensitive company data must only be accessed through approved systems.
Use the company self-service password reset portal first. If unsuccessful, contact IT support with your employee ID.
For hardware or laptop issues, create a helpdesk ticket and include the device serial number, issue summary, and urgency.
For HR-related support, email the HR operations team with your employee ID and request details.
